prediction.reasoning: For a 2-day prediction of MDT (Medtronic), I assume typical stock volatility of approximately 1-2% daily for large-cap healthcare stocks. Confidence intervals expand with higher confidence levels, incorporating potential daily moves of ±1.3% (50% CI), ±2.3% (80% CI), and ±3.1% (90% CI) based on historical volatility patterns of similar stocks.
